notes: All numbers are anonymized cohort statistics from 13 India D2C brands using Rebuy Engine on Shopify.
1 UAE brand excluded from INR-denominated averages.
1 brand excluded from revenue-share calculations due to B2B/wholesale contamination.
4 brands excluded from personalisation lift averages due to AOV inversions.
Categories with insufficient cohort size (<3 brands) fall back to 'overall'.

time_to_2nd_order_days.source: 50.7% of repeat buyers return by day 21; 37.7% by day 14.

repeat_revenue_pct.source: Returning customer revenue share across cohort: 12% to 66%.

returning_aov_premium_pct.source: Returning customers spend 24% more per order on average.

personalisation_aov_lift_pct.source: Average +51% AOV lift on personalised orders; range +16.3% to +92.8%.

repeat_rate_90d_pct.source: Protein/sports nutrition India avg ~24%, top 26.3%. Health supplements India avg ~13%, top 15.6%.

returning_aov_premium_pct.source: Health & Nutrition returning AOV premium +18% to +36%.

personalisation_aov_lift_pct.source: Nutrition supplement +76.6%, superfood +51.5%, health supplement +26.6%, wellness +22.7%.

beauty_personal_care._note: Insufficient cohort data in Edition 01. Falls back to overall benchmarks until Edition 02.

wellness_supplements._note: Mapped to Health & Nutrition cohort for Edition 01.

apparel_accessories._note: Insufficient cohort data in Edition 01. Falls back to overall benchmarks.

home_lifestyle._note: Insufficient cohort data in Edition 01. Falls back to overall benchmarks.

pet._note: Insufficient cohort data in Edition 01. Falls back to overall benchmarks.

_scoring_weights._note: Weights used by computeShelfScore() to produce 0-100 composite score. Sum to 1.0.

_gap_revenue_estimates._note: Default uplift assumptions used by gap revenue-at-stake calculator. All conservative.

missing_reorder_page.rationale: Most common priority gap. Reorder Page is the #1 missing feature; brands that ship it see 8-12% lift in repeat revenue share.

missing_loyalty_program.rationale: Loyalty programs (Nector, POPcoins) lift 90-day repeat rate by ~7 points in similar cohorts.

missing_post_purchase_upsell.rationale: Post-purchase Rebuy Smart Cart and upsell flows lift AOV 8-12% when properly configured.

missing_whatsapp_optin.rationale: Day-21 WhatsApp reorder URL flow captures 12-22% of repeat revenue at top quartile brands.

underutilised_rebuy.rationale: Moving from below-target Rebuy share (<12%) to portfolio average (15.8%) adds ~7 percentage points of store revenue from personalisation.

missing_fbt_pdp.rationale: Frequently Bought Together on PDPs adds 5-8% AOV when natural product pairings exist (which they do for 80%+ of brands per cohort data).
